title: Implement an outdoor tiling project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement an outdoor tiling project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for tiling project

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools and equipment required to implement an outdoor tiling project and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools and equipment required to implement an outdoor tiling project and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools and equipment required to implement an outdoor tiling project and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify environmental impacts of proposed works and implement controls if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental impacts of proposed works and implement controls if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental impacts of proposed works and implement controls if required.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities.

elements.title: Set out and prepare the site

pcs.text: Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage.

pcs.text: Assess existing base material where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess existing base material where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess existing base material where applicable.

pcs.text: Set out tiles to determine tiling pattern and identify cutting requirements according to site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set out tiles to determine tiling pattern and identify cutting requirements according to site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set out tiles to determine tiling pattern and identify cutting requirements according to site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Create template to form accurate curves and edges for tiled surfaces around walls and structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create template to form accurate curves and edges for tiled surfaces around walls and structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create template to form accurate curves and edges for tiled surfaces around walls and structures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set out and prepare the site

elements.title: Implement tiling project

pcs.text: Identify location of first tile
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of first tile?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of first tile.

pcs.text: Prepare mortar and adhesive according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare mortar and adhesive according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare mortar and adhesive according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Lay first tile
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lay first tile?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lay first tile.

pcs.text: Lay tiles according to tiling pattern, with perimeter tiles marked and cut to fit template requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lay tiles according to tiling pattern, with perimeter tiles marked and cut to fit template requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lay tiles according to tiling pattern, with perimeter tiles marked and cut to fit template requirements.

pcs.text: Fix tiles to specified grade, flush and square
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fix tiles to specified grade, flush and square?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fix tiles to specified grade, flush and square.

pcs.text: Mix grout and apply to joints according to specifications, to provide flush and smooth finish
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mix grout and apply to joints according to specifications, to provide flush and smooth finish?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mix grout and apply to joints according to specifications, to provide flush and smooth finish.

pcs.text: Polish or clean tiled surface according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Polish or clean tiled surface according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Polish or clean tiled surface according to manufacturer specifications.
